prompt: For LEED AP BD+C, integrative process differs from GA-level knowledge because it expects:

options.text: Application of credit synergies and prerequisite/credit relationships on real BD+C projects.
Memorization of only the LEED GA handbook glossary.
Ignoring regional priority credits entirely.
No understanding of MPRs.

explanation: Correct: Application of credit synergies and prerequisite/credit relationships on real BD+C projects. This aligns with Integrative Process, Location, and Transportation for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Integrative Process, Location, and Transportation.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Integrative Process, Location, and Transportation.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Integrative Process, Location, and Transportation.

sourceNote: Minimal preview bank — Integrative Process, Location, and Transportation (10 questions per topic seed).

prompt: A LEED Sustainable Sites strategy for stormwater management typically emphasizes:

options.text: Quantity and quality control using infiltration, detention, or reuse where feasible.
Directing all runoff to sanitary sewer without treatment.
Eliminating all landscaping to avoid irrigation.
Maximum impervious cover without mitigation.

explanation: Correct: Quantity and quality control using infiltration, detention, or reuse where feasible. This aligns with Sustainable Sites and Water Efficiency for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Sustainable Sites and Water Efficiency.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Sustainable Sites and Water Efficiency.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Sustainable Sites and Water Efficiency.

sourceNote: Minimal preview bank — Sustainable Sites and Water Efficiency (10 questions per topic seed).

prompt: In LEED BD+C Energy and Atmosphere, prerequisite energy metering requires:

options.text: Whole-building energy consumption tracking and sharing of data with the owner.
No submetering or benchmarking of any kind.
On-site fossil generation without limits.
Elimination of all renewable energy documentation.

explanation: Correct: Whole-building energy consumption tracking and sharing of data with the owner. This aligns with Energy and Atmosphere for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Energy and Atmosphere.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Energy and Atmosphere.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Energy and Atmosphere.

prompt: On a LEED BD+C project, Construction and Demolition Waste Management credits require:

options.text: Diversion of recyclable and recoverable materials from landfills with documented hauler data.
Landfilling 100% of waste without tracking.
No waste audit at any project phase.
Prohibiting reuse of salvaged materials.

explanation: Correct: Diversion of recyclable and recoverable materials from landfills with documented hauler data. This aligns with Materials and Resources for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Materials and Resources.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Materials and Resources.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Materials and Resources.

prompt: On a LEED BD+C project, Construction and Demolition Waste Management credits require:

options.text: Landfilling 100% of waste without tracking.
No waste audit at any project phase.
Prohibiting reuse of salvaged materials.
Diversion of recyclable and recoverable materials from landfills with documented hauler data.

explanation: Correct: Diversion of recyclable and recoverable materials from landfills with documented hauler data. This aligns with Materials and Resources for this readiness check.
